title: Prestige Made To Last Stainless Steel Saucepan with Lid 16cm - Small Saucepan with Straining Lid, Measurement Guide & Easy Grip Silicone Handles, Induction Suitable, Dishwasher Safe Cookware
features: DOUBLE SIDED STRAINING LID - These easy pouring saucepans feature double sided glass straining lids with 2 sizes and silicone easy grip handles, making your life easier in the kitchen
MEASUREMENT SCALE - Within the beautifully brushed steel interior, each saucepan comes with a handy measurement scale etched into the side, No measuring jug needed mean less washing up

INDUCTION SUITABLE - A high quality encapsulated steel base means that these saucepans are induction and all hob suitable whilst ensuring fast, even heat distribution, saving energy whilst eliminating hotspots
MIRROR POLISHED STAINLESS STEEL - With a stainless steel body that's mirror polished for a pristine finish, you'll find these saucepans look great, whilst being easy to clean and maintain
DISHWASHER & OVEN SAFE - Dishwasher safe and oven safe up to 180°C, these frying pans are the perfect durable everyday cookware that you will reach for again and again
description: From the manufacturer Built to last as long as the memories We exist to make busy home cooks feel supported & stress-free in the kitchen. We design products that are built for the way YOU cook today, focusing on simplicity and helpfulness Prestige Made To Last Tough Durable Stainless Steel Cookware With sustainability and durability at the core of our thoughts, here at Prestige we understand the need for cookware that will stand the test of time. Introducing MADE TO LAST Our new induction hob suitable, scratch resistant, polished stainless steel range. Practically designed to make your life as easy as possible with features such as ergonomic soft grip handles, dishwasher suitability and double sided straining lids. All whilst built to stand the test of time. Induction Hob Suitable Scratch Resistant Non Stick Dishwasher Safe Oven Safe Mirror Polished Stainless Steel Silicone Soft Grip Handles Double Sided Straining Lids Measurement Scale DOUBLE SIDED STRAINING LIDS These easy pouring saucepans feature double sided glass straining lids with 2 sizes and silicone easy grip handles, making your life easier in the kitchen SCRATCH RESISTANT NON STICK Non stick frying pan with a toughened non stick surface that's truly made to last. Choose these pans for enhanced cooking performance and a smooth easy cleaning surface ALL INDUCTION SUITABLE With high quality encapsulated steel bases this is great as an induction pan set whilst being all hob suitable. The steel bases also ensure fast, even heat distribution, saving energy whilst eliminating hotspots
